applied_fixes.fix: AC-1 now requires active matrix-listed runtime variables to be editable with constraints and applyScope.
Rationale now describes Wave4 as bounded transport bytes and this work as priority drain, projected bytes, and recovery barriers.
Non-canonical related requirement relations were converted to extends or depends_on.
Telemetry counters and soak pass/fail criteria now name queue counters, input failures, server rejections, and remainingVerifiedDescendants.
AC-6 now requires screen-snapshot:ready only after current-token snapshot recovery write completion, with observable failure path.
Settings matrix was expanded to exact per-key rows matching the implementation plan.
Each Settings-consuming requirement now depends_on FR-BGSTAB-015.
configTemplate trace path corrected to server/src/utils/configTemplate.ts in SRS and implementation plan.
Server safe-send scope now excludes frontend queued input release and references FR-BGSTAB-017.
Final validation now makes ConPTY redraw-flood E2E at https://localhost:2222 mandatory.
SettingsPage trace note now lists Server Transport, Visible Output Scheduler, Recovery Write Gate, Diagnostics Thresholds, and Stability Modes groups.
